product_highlights: Carbopol® polymer range for hair care rheology
Styleze™ film formers for long-wear styling
Specialty conditioning surfactants with low irritation
notes: Lubrizol is a leading specialty chemicals company with a comprehensive portfolio of hair care ingredients spanning surfactants, conditioning agents, and film formers. Their Styleze™ film former range is widely used for long-wear styling applications, while their specialty surfactants deliver high-quality cleansing with low irritation profiles. Lubrizol's ingredients are used globally in premium shampoos, conditioners, and styling products, and their EFfCI GMP certification ensures consistent quality.
